name: Hyprop Investments Limited
summary: Hyprop is a retail-focused REIT listed on the JSE with interests in a R48.5 billion portfolio of shopping centres in South Africa, Eastern Europe and sub-Saharan Africa. The Company's focus is on creating environments and opportunities for people to connect and have authentic and meaningful experiences. It does so by owning and managing dominant retail centres in mixed-used precincts, in key economic nodes in South Africa and Eastern Europe.
